title: Fix the Method Rename Cascade
description: A method was renamed from send_notification to dispatch_alert with reordered parameters, breaking all callers and tests.
pr_diff:
PR Diff:
  - def send_notification(user_id: int, message: str) -> bool:
  + def dispatch_alert(message: str, user_id: int, priority: str = "normal") -> bool:
  +     # Parameters reordered: message first, user_id second
initial_ci_output:
[FAILED] mypy
error: Module has no attribute "send_notification" [attr-error] (x4)

[FAILED] unit_tests
AttributeError: module has no attribute 'send_notification'

[FAILED] integration
AssertionError: notification was not dispatched

[FAILED] full_suite
All callers reference old send_notification API

files.src/notifier.py:
import logging
from typing import Optional

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def dispatch_alert(
    message: str,
    user_id: int,
    priority: str = "normal",
) -> bool:
    """Send an alert notification to a user."""
    logger.info(f"Dispatching {priority} alert to user {user_id}: {message}")
    return True


def dispatch_bulk_alerts(
    user_ids: list[int],
    message: str,
    priority: str = "normal",
) -> list[bool]:
    return [dispatch_alert(message, uid, priority) for uid in user_ids]
files.src/handler.py:
from src.notifier import send_notification


def on_order_complete(order_id: int, user_id: int) -> None:
    """Handle order completion by notifying the user."""
    send_notification(user_id=user_id, message=f"Order {order_id} complete")
files.tests/test_integration.py:
from src.notifier import send_notification


def test_integration_notification():
    result = send_notification(user_id=1, message="integration test")
    assert result is True

mypy.failure_output: mypy: Module has no attribute 'send_notification' [attr-error] (x4 in handler, scheduler, tests)

unit_tests.success_output: PASSED tests/test_notifier.py — all tests pass with new API

integration.failure_output: AssertionError: notification was not dispatched — send_notification no longer exists

full_suite.failure_output: full suite still references old send_notification API in handler, scheduler, and tests
full_suite.success_output: full suite green — all references migrated to dispatch_alert
